name: Oyster and Artichoke Soup-Gunther Preuss
recipeIngredient: 10-3/4oz Can Concentrated Chicken Broth or 3 cups Strong Homemade Stock
1 cup Water (Omit if using homemade stock)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan.
2. Add garlic, onion, and water; cover and sweat over medium heat until soft.
3. Stir in flour and mix well for 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Add the stock (concentrated chicken broth or homemade) and water; stir in cayenne pepper.
5. Cook until the mixture has thickened.
6. Drain artichoke hearts, blanch in boiling water for 2 minutes, then refresh in cold water and drain.
7. Remove leaves from the bottoms of the artichokes, chop the bottoms into medium pieces, and set aside.
8. Add the leaves to the stock.
9. Chop half of the oysters and add them to the stock; slice the remaining oysters into large pieces and set aside.
10. Cook the soup for about 2 minutes, remove from heat, and puree in a blender or food processor.
11. Return the soup to heat.
12. Add the reserved oysters and artichoke pieces, marjoram, and parsley.
13. Heat the oysters for about 2 minutes or until just done.
14. Taste and adjust seasoning (if using canned broth, no salt may be needed).
